channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Mother of Murderer Jailed for Concealing Weapon at Crime Scene
item.description: The mother of Henry Nowak's murderer, Kiran Kaur, has been sentenced to three years in prison for removing the murder weapon from the crime scene. The 53-year-old woman, who is the mother of 21-year-o...

item.title: Mayor Jennifer Barzaga to run for vacant congressional seat
item.description: Mayor Jennifer Barzaga of Dasmariñas, Cavite, will run in a special election to fill the congressional seat vacated by her son Francisco 'Kiko' Barzaga's expulsion from the House of Representatives. T...

item.title: Madlanga Commission Continues Inquiry into Justice System Corruption
item.description: The Madlanga commission of inquiry into corruption within the criminal justice system is ongoing, with proceedings continuing on Friday, July 17, 2026. The commission, which has been investigating sys...

item.title: Regulatory challenges and customs delays in Tanzania
item.description: Kevin Luande's article highlights the inefficiencies within Tanzania's regulatory framework, emphasizing the need for reform. He recounts a personal experience where customs officials delayed furnitur...

item.title: Anti-immigrant protests in Jeffreys Bay lead to looting and arrests
item.description: Anti-immigrant protests in Jeffreys Bay turned violent on Thursday, resulting in the looting of 23 spaza shops and the arrest of 69 individuals. Police spokeswoman Brigadier Nobuntu Gantana confirmed ...

item.title: Gojira confirm Mario Duplantier will miss US festival dates because of visa issues, with Luigi Paraventi stepping in
item.description: Gojira have announced that drummer Mario Duplantier will be unable to perform at the band's scheduled US festival appearances because of ongoing visa and immigration issues. The French metal group sha...

item.title: Telangana Police and Telugu Film Industry Strengthen Joint Crackdown on Online Film Piracy
item.description: The Telangana Police, in collaboration with the Telangana Film Chamber of Commerce (TFCC), have significantly strengthened their efforts to combat digital piracy affecting the Telugu film industry. Fo...

item.title: Wage growth struggles as inflation outpaces pay rises
item.description: The article highlights the growing disparity between wage growth and inflation, with many workers feeling underpaid despite recent pay rises. The Consumer Price Index rose 4% over 12 months, outpacing...

item.title: Abdul El-Sayed Discusses AIPAC Spending and Defunding Police Policies
item.description: The article features Abdul El-Sayed, a political commentator, discussing his views on AIPAC's spending priorities, the 'defund the police' movement, and clarifying his political stance as not being a ...

item.title: Pat King faces resentencing after appeal court overturns intimidation acquittal
item.description: Pat King, a prominent figure in the 2022 Ottawa convoy protests, will undergo a new sentencing process after the Ontario Court of Appeal reversed his acquittal on intimidation charges. The court's dec...

item.title: Farmer Rescues Injured Philippine Eagle, Earns Recognition
item.description: A 21-year-old farmer from Bukidnon, Marvin Linoy, rescued an injured Philippine Eagle after a group of monkeys attacked the rare bird in Barangay Dalwangan, Malaybalay. By imitating a dog's bark, Lino...

item.title: Nigeria's $52bn Reserves Aim to Stabilize FX Market
item.description: Central Bank Governor Olayemi Cardoso explained that Nigeria's external reserves, now over $52 billion, are meant to protect against shocks and currency volatility, not to fund daily liquidity needs. ...

item.title: Garry Sobers, cricket’s greatest all-rounder, passes away at 89
item.description: Garry Sobers, widely regarded as the most complete cricketer in history, has passed away at the age of 89. Born with two extra fingers, he removed them as a child using a sharp knife and catgut. His c...

item.title: Key News Stories from Tanzania: Health, Safety, and Global Issues
item.description: The news article highlights several critical developments across Tanzania and beyond. First, it mentions the continuation of Mkapa’s legacy in advancing national health initiatives, emphasizing ongoin...

item.title: Multi-vehicle Collision Leaves One Dead and Seven Injured in QC
item.description: A multi-vehicle collision involving five cars occurred in Quezon City, resulting in one fatality and seven injuries. The incident, reported on July 18, 2026, prompted immediate traffic management effo...

item.title: Weekly Economic Reports and Earnings Schedule for Investors
item.description: The article provides a detailed calendar of key economic reports and corporate earnings that will impact financial markets in the upcoming week. It outlines daily events starting with Monday, July 20,...

item.title: ICE contractor shoots protester during workplace dispute, faces murder charges
item.description: An employee at an Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) detention facility in Aurora, Colorado, shot a protester outside the facility on Thursday night, according to local reports. The incident oc...

item.title: Reading Festival Applies for License to Extend to Four Days with Thursday Music Performances
item.description: The organisers of Reading Festival have submitted a licensing application to expand the event to four days, including music performances on Thursday nights. This change would align it with its sister ...

item.title: Cape Town proposal for a Metro Police Detective Branch raises legal and policing jurisdiction concerns
item.description: Cape Town Mayor Geordin Hill-Lewis has announced a proposal to establish what would become South Africa's first Metro Police Detective Branch if the Democratic Alliance retains control of the City in ...

item.title: AAC Candidate Sowore Launches Mobile App for 2027 Elections
item.description: Omoyele Sowore, the African Action Congress (AAC) presidential candidate, has launched the ‘SoworeNow’ mobile app to boost political mobilization ahead of Nigeria's 2027 elections. The app, available ...
